title: SFT LoRA direct generation
runtime_notes: Plain pathway SFT LoRA baseline; direct generation uses the SFT adapter produced by this row.
design_notes: Baseline; maintained SFT script uses config-file runtime defaults and can run single-process or under torchrun.

title: Distributed SFT LoRA direct generation
inference_mode: Qwen + distributed SFT LoRA direct generation
runtime_notes: Distributed SFT baseline launched through torchrun.
design_notes: Wrapper launches method.training.sft through torch.distributed.run; pass --nproc-per-node after the experiment '--' separator.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Current forced/damped HNN FrameworkA baseline
training_coupling: LoRA and HNN jointly updated; AE frozen
runtime_notes: FrameworkA joint LoRA + HNN-style regularization; direct inference uses the LoRA adapter only.
design_notes: Current force/damp HNN-style baseline. It tests a dynamics-regularized second LoRA but still performs direct LoRA inference.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: FrameworkA PHNN prompt-control regularized LoRA
training_coupling: LoRA and PHNN jointly updated; AE frozen
runtime_notes: PHNN prompt-control prototype; direct inference uses the trained adapter only.
design_notes: PHNN candidate for the same dynamics-model layer. It should be compared after the AE/dynamics training-coupling question is fixed.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Controlled Neural ODE latent teacher
middle_network: generic controlled Neural ODE MLP vector field
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only Neural ODE teacher and rollout scoring.
design_notes: Learns dz/dt=f(z,u,t) on AE latent trajectories and scores rollout fit.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Controlled gradient-flow energy latent teacher
middle_network: dissipative energy network dz/dt=-R grad E(z,u,t)+Gu
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only gradient-flow energy teacher and rollout scoring.
design_notes: Energy-based dissipative baseline for interpretable latent trajectory fitting.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Controlled Koopman latent teacher
middle_network: controlled approximately linear Koopman latent dynamics
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only Koopman teacher and rollout scoring.
design_notes: Linear latent-evolution baseline for testing whether simple dynamics suffice.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Controlled GENERIC latent teacher
middle_network: GENERIC-style reversible plus irreversible energy/entropy dynamics
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only GENERIC-style teacher and rollout scoring.
design_notes: Tests reversible/irreversible structured dynamics beyond HNN/PHNN.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Sparse-library SINDy latent teacher
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only sparse SINDy teacher and rollout scoring.
design_notes: Uses a compact library [1,t,z,z^2,sin(z),u,z*u] with L1 sparsity.

layer_name: core latent-space and dynamics model selection
title: Encoder-conditioned latent ODE teacher
training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Dynamics-only Latent ODE teacher with prompt-derived initial state.
design_notes: Stricter than b02 because rollout initial state is inferred from the prompt/control vector instead of copied from the target answer trajectory.

title: Neural ODE rollout-assisted candidate reranking
training_coupling: train Neural ODE teacher, then use it only at inference reranking
runtime_notes: Rollout-assisted inference row; training reuses the Neural ODE teacher.
design_notes: Requires candidate columns in the input CSV; picks lowest rollout-loss candidate.

title: Neural ODE rollout residual injection
middle_network: trained Neural ODE latent teacher plus frozen AE decoder
training_coupling: train Neural ODE teacher, then inject decoded rollout residual at inference
runtime_notes: Rollout-assisted generation row; training reuses the Neural ODE teacher.
design_notes: Prototype isolated from normal direct LoRA inference; injects residual into final prompt embedding.

title: Staged Neural ODE teacher distilled into LoRA
middle_network: frozen trained Neural ODE latent teacher plus frozen AE decoder
training_coupling: SFT LoRA updated with an additional frozen-teacher velocity distillation loss
runtime_notes: Staged teacher-to-LoRA distillation; direct generation uses only the distilled adapter.
design_notes: Two-stage framework: train teacher first, then train only LoRA against SFT CE plus teacher decoded-velocity alignment.

title: Joint Neural ODE-regularized LoRA
middle_network: trainable controlled Neural ODE MLP vector field
training_coupling: LoRA and Neural ODE jointly updated; AE frozen
inference_mode: Qwen + jointly trained LoRA direct generation
runtime_notes: Joint LoRA + Neural ODE regularization; direct generation uses the trained adapter.
design_notes: Generalized FrameworkA row using method.training.joint_lora_dynamics with --variant neural_ode.

title: Joint gradient-flow-regularized LoRA
middle_network: trainable dissipative energy network dz/dt=-R grad E(z,u,t)+Gu
training_coupling: LoRA and gradient-flow dynamics jointly updated; AE frozen
inference_mode: Qwen + jointly trained LoRA direct generation
runtime_notes: Joint LoRA + gradient-flow regularization; direct generation uses the trained adapter.
design_notes: Generalized FrameworkA row using method.training.joint_lora_dynamics with --variant gradient_flow.

title: Qwen C2S transfer application
middle_network: none in runtime; C2S LoRA fine-tuning
training_coupling: Qwen LoRA initialized from pathway adapter in legacy scripts
inference_mode: Qwen C2S LoRA generation plus Task VI evaluator
runtime_notes: Task VI C2S transfer/application row using the 5 percent small split.
design_notes: Optional downstream transfer/application row. Run after the core pathway dynamics model is selected.

title: Speculative LeJEPA-style pathway sentence probe
middle_network: JEPA predictor head with SIGReg-style anti-collapse regularizer
training_coupling: frozen Qwen/optional LoRA embeddings plus trainable JEPA head; lowest priority
inference_mode: latent prediction scoring, not text generation
runtime_notes: Sentence/prompt-level LeJEPA-style latent prediction probe; non-generative inference.
design_notes: Lowest-priority speculative idea. Keep out of the first core dynamics benchmark unless extra time remains.
